action.reasoning: Observation: Three V2 models trained with seeds 42/123/456, getting val z500_rmse of 449.9/448.2/450.1. Current best eval is 451.74 with single model. Analysis: Ensemble of 3 models + TTA should reduce error. predict.py already finds all best_v2_seed*.pt files. Decision: Submit eval with ensemble immediately.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/best_v2_seed42.pt --output /tmp/test_ensemble.json && echo 'Ensemble prediction successful' && python -c "import numpy as np; p=np.load('/tmp/test_ensemble_predictions.npy'); print(f'Shape: {p.shape}, Z500 range: [{p[:,0].min():.1f}, {p[:,0].max():.1f}], T850 range: [{p[:,1].min():.1f}, {p[:,1].max():.1f}]')"
